title: Maaya Nizhal
subtitle: Cover Design
description: I designed the cover for a novel that weaves romance, melancholy, and music into a bittersweet love triangle. The story follows a musician who falls for an unseen voice, only to lose her and then mistake her cousin for the original. The cover needed to echo longing, loss, and the redemptive power of music—a delicate balance I captured through imagery, typography, and mood.
